text_en: Small choices can change the way we grow.
translation_zh: 微小的选择能够改变我们成长的方式。

text_en: Make room for small choices, even on a busy day.
translation_zh: 即使生活忙碌，也要为微小的选择留出空间。

text_en: We move forward when we value small choices.
translation_zh: 当我们珍视微小的选择时，就会不断前进。

text_en: A better day often begins with small choices.
translation_zh: 更好的一天往往始于微小的选择。

text_en: Remember the value of small choices when the road feels long.
translation_zh: 当道路漫长时，请记得微小的选择的价值。

text_en: There is real strength in small choices.
translation_zh: 微小的选择之中蕴含着真正的力量。

text_en: Let small choices guide your next step.
translation_zh: 让微小的选择指引你的下一步。

text_en: With small choices, hard days become easier to face.
translation_zh: 拥有微小的选择，艰难的日子也更容易面对。

text_en: Choose to make small choices part of your life.
translation_zh: 选择让微小的选择成为生活的一部分。

text_en: The future becomes brighter through small choices.
translation_zh: 未来会因微小的选择而变得更加明亮。

text_en: Consistent discipline turns ordinary moments into opportunities to improve.
translation_zh: 始终如一的自律能把平凡的时刻变成提升自我的机会。

text_en: Lasting confidence is often built through consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 持久的自信往往通过始终如一的自律建立起来。

text_en: When circumstances change, consistent discipline helps us adapt without losing direction.
translation_zh: 当环境变化时，始终如一的自律帮助我们在适应中不失方向。

text_en: The quality of our decisions reflects how deeply we value consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 我们决策的质量，反映了我们对始终如一的自律的重视程度。

text_en: Real growth becomes possible when consistent discipline replaces the fear of failure.
translation_zh: 当始终如一的自律取代对失败的恐惧时，真正的成长才成为可能。

text_en: A demanding goal becomes manageable when supported by consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 有了始终如一的自律的支撑，再艰巨的目标也会变得可控。

text_en: Communities become stronger when they are shaped by consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 由始终如一的自律塑造的群体会变得更加牢固。

text_en: We discover better answers by approaching uncertainty with consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 以始终如一的自律面对不确定性，我们便能找到更好的答案。

text_en: Success feels more worthwhile when it grows from consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 源于始终如一的自律的成功，会让人感到更有价值。

text_en: Even a difficult conversation can become constructive through consistent discipline.
translation_zh: 即使是艰难的对话，也能通过始终如一的自律变得富有建设性。

translation_zh: 由务实的智慧塑造的群体会变得更加牢固。

text_en: We discover better answers by approaching uncertainty with practical wisdom.
translation_zh: 以务实的智慧面对不确定性，我们便能找到更好的答案。

text_en: Success feels more worthwhile when it grows from practical wisdom.
translation_zh: 源于务实的智慧的成功，会让人感到更有价值。

text_en: Even a difficult conversation can become constructive through practical wisdom.
translation_zh: 即使是艰难的对话，也能通过务实的智慧变得富有建设性。

text_en: Creative patience turns ordinary moments into opportunities to improve.
translation_zh: 富有创造力的耐心能把平凡的时刻变成提升自我的机会。

text_en: Lasting confidence is often built through creative patience.
translation_zh: 持久的自信往往通过富有创造力的耐心建立起来。

text_en: When circumstances change, creative patience helps us adapt without losing direction.
translation_zh: 当环境变化时，富有创造力的耐心帮助我们在适应中不失方向。

text_en: The quality of our decisions reflects how deeply we value creative patience.
translation_zh: 我们决策的质量，反映了我们对富有创造力的耐心的重视程度。

text_en: Real growth becomes possible when creative patience replaces the fear of failure.
translation_zh: 当富有创造力的耐心取代对失败的恐惧时，真正的成长才成为可能。

text_en: A demanding goal becomes manageable when supported by creative patience.

text_en: Success feels more worthwhile when it grows from creative patience.

text_en: Intellectual humility enables us to revise our assumptions without abandoning our values.
translation_zh: 求知上的谦逊使我们能够修正假设，同时不放弃自身价值观。

text_en: In an age of easy certainty, intellectual humility remains an indispensable form of strength.
translation_zh: 在一个轻易下定论的时代，求知上的谦逊仍是一种不可或缺的力量。

text_en: Complex problems rarely yield to confidence alone; they also demand intellectual humility.
translation_zh: 复杂问题很少仅凭自信就能解决，它们还需要求知上的谦逊。

text_en: By cultivating intellectual humility, we learn to distinguish firm principles from rigid habits.
translation_zh: 通过培养求知上的谦逊，我们学会区分坚定的原则与僵化的习惯。

text_en: Intellectual humility gives difficult truths the space to become useful rather than divisive.
translation_zh: 求知上的谦逊让艰难的真相有机会发挥作用，而非制造分裂。

text_en: The most enduring institutions pair clear purpose with intellectual humility.
translation_zh: 最具生命力的制度，会把清晰的目标与求知上的谦逊结合起来。

text_en: Without intellectual humility, expertise can quietly harden into unquestioned authority.
translation_zh: 缺少求知上的谦逊，专业知识可能悄然固化为不容质疑的权威。

text_en: Intellectual humility allows disagreement to sharpen judgment instead of weakening trust.
translation_zh: 求知上的谦逊能让分歧磨砺判断力，而不是削弱信任。

text_en: Progress becomes sustainable when ambition is tempered by intellectual humility.
translation_zh: 当雄心受到求知上的谦逊的调和时，进步才能持续。

text_en: Our response to uncertainty reveals whether we have truly developed intellectual humility.
translation_zh: 我们对不确定性的回应，反映出自己是否真正培养了求知上的谦逊。

translation_zh: 建立在充分认知上的信念让艰难的真相有机会发挥作用，而非制造分裂。

text_en: The most enduring institutions pair clear purpose with informed conviction.
translation_zh: 最具生命力的制度，会把清晰的目标与建立在充分认知上的信念结合起来。

text_en: Without informed conviction, expertise can quietly harden into unquestioned authority.
translation_zh: 缺少建立在充分认知上的信念，专业知识可能悄然固化为不容质疑的权威。

text_en: Informed conviction allows disagreement to sharpen judgment instead of weakening trust.
translation_zh: 建立在充分认知上的信念能让分歧磨砺判断力，而不是削弱信任。

text_en: Progress becomes sustainable when ambition is tempered by informed conviction.
translation_zh: 当雄心受到建立在充分认知上的信念的调和时，进步才能持续。

text_en: Our response to uncertainty reveals whether we have truly developed informed conviction.
translation_zh: 我们对不确定性的回应，反映出自己是否真正培养了建立在充分认知上的信念。
